title: Anatomy of a Cohomology Wall: The Koszul section-map rank defect on the tetraquadric Calabi-Yau threefold
description: Software and computational archive accompanying the paper of the same title. Includes paper source (LaTeX), verification scripts, exact finite-field raw logs for b=4 and b=5 checks, and a reproducibility suite. The release proves the all-b Toeplitz determinantal saturation theorem in the acyclic range and gives the corrected source-target ceiling condition. Code is MIT-licensed under LICENSE. The paper, README, CHANGELOG, figures, and documentation are CC BY 4.0 under LICENSE-DOCS. The mathematical results themselves are not copyrightable.
notes: Split license: repository code (scripts/, reproduce.py) is MIT (LICENSE); the paper and documentation (paper/, README, CHANGELOG, figures) are CC BY 4.0 (LICENSE-DOCS). The top-level deposit license MIT matches the software upload type; the mathematical results themselves are not copyrightable. See NOTICE for the full statement.
